title: Slovakian Knafeh Gratin
description: A unique and delicious Slovakian-inspired take on the Middle Eastern dessert, knafeh, featuring a creamy, sweet, and crispy gratin topping.
instructions: Prepare the Slovakian pierogi dough according to the package instructions.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of shredded knafeh cheese in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the cheese to form a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Place the knafeh-filled pierogi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with vanilla extract.
Top with a layer of grated gratin topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the gratin is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
